audit_log_store_duration: Retention period of member operation logs
confirm_logout: Are you sure you want to log out?
custom_domain.DNS_resolve_hint: Please go to your domain service provider and add a CNAME record for the domain pointing to <bold>{{domain}}</bold>. After the DNS record takes effect, you can bind it as a custom domain.
custom_domain.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this custom domain?
custom_domain.registration_hint: Please prepare your own domain and complete the filing through <bold>{{provider}}</bold>, and then enter the domain in the input box below.
model.alias_tip: Display name of the model in the system for easier understanding.
model.censor_tip: Enable this if sensitive content detection is required.
model.charsPointsPrice_tip: Combine input and output for token billing. If input and output prices are configured separately, they will be calculated individually.
model.custom_cq_prompt_tip:
Overwrite the default system prompt for question classification. Default:
"""
{{prompt}}
"""
model.custom_extract_prompt_tip:
Overwrite the default system prompt. Default:
"""
{{prompt}}
"""
model.defaultConfig_tip: The additional Body parameter will be included in each request.
model.default_config_tip:
Merge these settings when users send a chat request. Example:
"""
{
   "temperature": 1,
   "max_tokens": null
}
"""
model.default_system_chat_prompt_tip: The default prompt will be included in all chats using the model.
model.default_token_tip: Default text chunk size for indexing models, which must be smaller than the maximum context length.
model.creator: Creator
model.permission_tip: If it is public, all users in the platform can use the model by default. If it is private, only you can see it by default. If you want to share it with others, you can set permissions in the "Available Models" section.
model.delete_model_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete the model?
model.function_call_tip: Enable this if the model supports function calling. Tool calling takes higher priority.
model.input_price_tip: If configured, the overall price will become invalid.
model.json_config_confirm: Are you sure you want to apply the configuration?
model.json_config_tip: You can use the configuration file to overwrite the current model configuration. Please make sure the file is correct and back up the current configuration first.
model.model_id_tip: Unique identifier of the model. This must match the model value from the provider and correspond to the OneAPI channel.
model.normalization_tip:
If the Embedding API does not normalize vectors, enable this option to let the system normalize them.
Without normalization, the vector search score will be greater than 1.
model.output_price_tip: If configured, the overall price will become invalid.
model.reasoning_tip: For example, Deepseek-reasoner can output the reasoning process.
model.request_auth_tip: The header Authorization: Bearer xxx will be included in the requests sent to the custom request URL, where xxx will be replaced by the specified request key.
model.request_url_tip:
If specified, requests will be sent directly to this address without going through OneAPI. Follow the OpenAI API format and provide a complete request URL. Example:
LLM: {{host}}/v1/chat/completions
Embedding: {{host}}/v1/embeddings
STT: {{host}}/v1/audio/transcriptions
TTS: {{host}}/v1/audio/speech
Rerank: {{host}}/v1/rerank
model.tool_choice_tip: Enable this if the model supports tool calling.
model.price_tier_max_required: Except for the last gradient, the upper limit of the interval must be filled in.
model.price_tier_prev_range_required: Please complete the upper bound of the previous interval first.
model.price_tier_price_required: Each price gradient must have at least one input or output price configured.
model.price_tier_range_invalid: The price gradient interval settings are incorrect. Please check whether the upper limit of the interval is increasing.
model.price_tiers_tip: Match a gradient based on the input token range, and charge based on the input and output prices of the gradient. The range start is automatically increased by the previous gradient. The upper limit of the last gradient is left blank to indicate that it is unlimited.
model.support_train_tip: After enabling, the model will expose the training button, which can be used for fine-tuning training based on the model.
model.test_mode_tip: After enabling, the model will have a Beta tag when selected.
model.vision_tip: Enable this if the model supports image recognition.
upgrade_to_use_custom_domain: The current plan does not support custom domain names. Please upgrade your plan first.
